message:
fix(security): add path validation and identity filtering

- manifest.rs: Reject absolute paths and path traversal sequences
  (e.g., /etc/passwd, ../../../etc/passwd) in bundle file entries
  to prevent directory traversal attacks during bundle extraction

- shadow.rs: Filter observations by identity_hash in get_history()
  to correctly handle PID reuse scenarios where the same PID is
  assigned to different processes over time

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
